reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

reference_images.label: umbra_scale_character
reference_images.purpose: Umbra silhouette, limb taper, eye glow placement, and cloak-like vapor edge anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle for the player state machine and keep the standing origin at the center of the rear foot across all Umbra states.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/player_umbra_idle_6f_6fps.png through AssetServer during player spawn and register it inside UmbraScaleArtManifest.
runtime_notes: Idle loop plays at 6 fps whenever movement and exposure flags are both inactive.
The sprite swaps cleanly with run, jump, and exposure variants without moving the collision capsule.
Silhouette readability must hold against both dark shadow pools and bright beam edges.

context.usage: Default stance while the player studies beam direction and prepares the next mirror or scale move from a safe shadow pocket.

shape.silhouette: Compact living shadow with tapered limbs, a cloak-like trailing lower body, and one bright eye slit under a pointed head crest.

appendages.accessories: Small gold chest sigil and a thin light catch on the eye edge.

specs.texture: Smooth silhouette fill with a faint teal rim inside the lower body and a single gold sigil notch.
specs.shading: Deep black core with narrow teal lift in the lower torso and a bright eye edge.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 192x48 px with six 32x48 frames.
The eye slit stays on the upper third of the head in every frame and never exceeds 4x2 px.
The standing footprint remains inside a 20 px width so the animation does not drift off narrow platforms.
